verdict.answer_first: B states it immediately: "It's a data-leak bug waiting to happen"; A also does with "Short version: this is a cross-request data leak waiting to happen."
verdict.decisiveness: B commits cleanly to the fix: "thread the value explicitly instead of stashing it"; A also recommends "Don't hold request state in module scope."
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now because it gives the direct replacement, "res.send(render(req.user))", without extra code volume; A is also actionable but longer.
